body.purpose: Dense technical explanation with calm readability.

label.purpose: System metadata, chips, and interface annotation.

shadows.name: ambient-shell
shadows.purpose: Primary containment shadow for shells, cards, and overlays.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default transition easing in the current codebase.

motion.name: hover-lift
motion.purpose: Shared hover motion for buttons and interactive links.

motion.name: lab-pulse
motion.purpose: Brief activation pulse for semantic search results.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main call to action with controlled brightness and subtle lift.
components.css: .button.button-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-height: 50px; padding: 0 20px; border-radius: 999px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #72e2c2, #a5ff8c); color: #04101c; font-weight: 700; transition: transform 180ms ease, border-color 180ms ease, background 180ms ease; } .button.button-primary:hover, .button.button-primary:focus-visible { transform: translateY(-2px); }

components.name: Frosted Panel Card
components.description: Core container treatment for hero blocks, cards, and content sections.
components.html:
System Depth

Architecture, retrieval, and interface craft in one surface.
components.css: .ds-panel-card { background: rgba(10, 22, 40, 0.72); color: #ecf4ff; border: 1px solid rgba(159, 180, 214, 0.18); border-radius: 28px; padding: 26px; backdrop-filter: blur(18px); box-shadow: 0 24px 80px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.28); } .ds-panel-card p { color: #a8b7d3; line-height: 1.72; }

components.name: Command Palette Dialog
components.description: Signature overlay interaction for navigation and project shortcuts.
components.html: Command center
components.css: .ds-command-dialog { width: min(680px, calc(100% - 28px)); margin: 11vh auto 0; padding: 20px; border-radius: 24px; background: rgba(7, 17, 31, 0.96); border: 1px solid rgba(159, 180, 214, 0.3); box-shadow: 0 24px 80px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.28); } .ds-command-dialog input { width: 100%; padding: 16px 18px; border-radius: 16px; border: 1px solid rgba(159, 180, 214, 0.18); background: rgba(3, 10, 20, 0.88); color: #ecf4ff; }

components.name: Architecture Frame
components.description: Diagrammatic component that visualizes backend thinking without leaving the site's visual language.
components.html:
Client UX
API Layer
Graph Context
components.css: .ds-architecture-frame { padding: 22px; border-radius: 20px; border: 1px solid rgba(159, 180, 214, 0.3); background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.025), rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.02)); } .ds-architecture-row { display: flex; gap: 12px; flex-wrap: wrap; } .ds-architecture-node { flex: 1 1 100px; padding: 12px 14px; border-radius: 14px; border: 1px solid rgba(159, 180, 214, 0.18); background: rgba(7, 17, 31, 0.82); color: #ecf4ff; font-family: "SFMono-Regular", "JetBrains Mono", monospace; font-size: 0.88rem; } .ds-architecture-node-accent { background: rgba(114, 226, 194, 0.12); border-color: rgba(114, 226, 194, 0.22); color: #72e2c2; } .ds-architecture-line { width: 2px; height: 22px; margin: 10px auto; background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(114, 226, 194, 0.8), rgba(114, 226, 194, 0)); }

dos: Preserve the cool-night palette and mint-led activation hierarchy.
Keep dark surfaces translucent and layered instead of flattening them.
Maintain the serif, sans, and mono role split.
donts: Do not make the site generic or template-shaped.
Do not use stock developer-portfolio tropes.
Do not drift into interchangeable SaaS dark-mode styling.
Do not use hype-heavy AI visuals with little substance.
Do not add gimmicks that feel louder than the work itself.
Do not make the site feel mass-produced, derivative, or like it is borrowing someone else's identity.
